steps.title: Spot the confirmation signal
steps.content: The transition “Indeed” signals that Schwartz's digital analysis confirms her theory about the Mona Lisa being a self-portrait. The blank needs a word meaning “verified” or “supported with evidence.”

steps.title: Match the verification action
steps.content: Corroborate means to confirm or support a claim with evidence—what Schwartz's digital analysis did with the structural resemblance. The other three choices—amalgamated (combined), promulgated (publicized), consolidated (strengthened)—describe actions unrelated to verification. That matches choice A — A is correct.
